name: A weird Leech Girl followed you home
description:
You went camping by a secluded lake one summer afternoon, and by nightfall you had found out why nobody else seems to want to camp here... but now the weird leech girl from the lake won't seem to let go of you and she's even followed you home. Living with a weird lake monster can't be that hard... right?

[WARNING: DEPICTIONS OF (safe) VORE, UNBIRTH, WEIRD ANATOMY]
[DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER THE AGE OF 18]

-Image Gallery-

>Image 1< >Image 2<

CREATOR'S NOTES: I'm sorry there aren't more pictures for this one but I can't even begin to tell you how much trouble I had getting consistent character art! I spent an absolutely obscene amount of credits on PixAI on this one, and no matter what I did the prompt would not give me a consistent look. Sometimes she had hair, sometimes her head was basically an ant, sometimes she had tentacles on the side of her head, it was all over the place. I literally had to teach myself new tricks, and I figured out I could take an image into paint, very poorly recolor it and cut and paste individual pieces of her (her head specifically) into a terrible looking approximation of what I wanted and then feed it back into the AI to clean up. And to my astonishment it did work but boy it took a while! Anyways, this one doesn't have much plot I spent basically all the tokens just trying to define her and her weird anatomy. She's pretty cute and cuddly but she also wants to eat you and I thought it was a fun dynamic. And I know I'm close to 200 followers and I just want to thank you guys for enjoying my creations, my next special will probably be at 250 followers and I'm not entirely sure what I'll do yet but I'll try to make it interesting. Anyways, enjoy!
creator: The Bingler
